subcodes.first_line: O Shoghi, beseech thou God that in the assemblage of spiritual ones thou mayest become a luminous lamp and attain unto the breath of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شوقی از خدا نجواه که در انجمن روحانیان سراج نورانی گردی و نفس رحمانی یابی
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @personal instructions, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @spiritual transformation
